mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, directly boosting S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows or forward returns are negative in more than 55% of rate-cut months.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.4 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce consumer spending expectations and trigger negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 60% of triggered months or the signal shows no statistical significance with p greater than 0.05 in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates broad-based demand recovery that sustains corporate earnings growth and drives positive S&P 500 returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative forward returns in more than 50% of cases or the interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp contractions in the index of industrial production during liquidity crunches trigger immediate risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict negative returns during stress periods or produces positive returns in more than 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation combined with stagnant federal funds rates erodes real yields and prompts equity valuation compression, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL increases > 0.3% while FEDFUNDS remains flat
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when real yields decline or the interaction effect is statistically insignificant across rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic capacity and rising wage income that supports corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 returns over three months.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over 3-year periods or payroll growth correlates negatively with forward equity returns.

mechanism_narrative: Negative quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP signals immediate demand destruction that forces earnings downgrades and triggers negative S&P 500 returns within one week.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 60% of contraction quarters or the signal loses predictive power after controlling for market volatility.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production rebounds during early-cycle expansions indicate capacity utilization improvements that boost corporate profit margins and drive positive S&P 500 forward returns.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO turns positive after 3 consecutive months of decline
failure_condition: Signal yields negative returns in more than 50% of triggered instances or fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark during expansion phases.
